helper_landscape_summary: Null-space gradient projection + low-rank subspace methods (GNSP, GaLore, Lotus, LoRA-Null, Various-Grained, Optimal Low-Rank). Candidate combines null-space-traversal with Steiner-symmetrization-style updates.

hints.hint_text: GNSP formalizes gradient projection onto null space; check if candidate is restatement.
Steiner symmetrization reduces to rearrangement-preserving update; check vs GaLore SVD + sign-symmetrize.
Lotus randomized subspace switching; if candidate alternates null-space bases.
LoRA-Null restricts updates to pretraining null space.
Optimal Low-Rank minimax bounds; symmetrization may shift variance only.

solver_traces.search_query: GNSP null space projection vs symmetrization gradient
solver_traces.reasoning: GNSP uses P=I-A^+A null-space projector; no pre-symmetrization. Candidate adds Steiner rearrangement BEFORE projection.
GaLore SVD-projects gradient; Steiner symmetrization is NOT equivalent to GaLore sign flip - Steiner preserves level-set measure, sign flip does not.
Lotus alternates random subspaces; candidate uses fixed null-space basis with Steiner rearrangement. Different mechanism.

solver_traces.search_query: LoRA-Null pretraining null space full rank
solver_traces.reasoning: LoRA-Null restricts to pretraining null space; candidate's full-rank limit does not degenerate to LoRA-Null because Steiner rearrangement persists.

solver_traces.search_query: Optimal Low-Rank Stochastic Gradient minimax bound
solver_traces.reasoning: Minimax bound is for variance; Steiner symmetrization preserves variance distribution. Candidate may shift bias without improving bound.
Multi-scale projector; orthogonal to symmetrization step.

tree_stream_rationale: No hint returns 'anticipated'; max sim 0.55 (H1 GNSP adjacency). Tree-stream FAIL driven by step 10 mechanical (5 keyword hits in null-space-projection cluster GaLore/GNSP/Lotus etc.). Composition novelty plausible but mechanical verdict dominates.
